text:
お見事、素晴らしい結果ね。
今回の特訓も問題なくクリア、と。

実力が伸びている感じが薄いかも
しれないけれど、他者から見れば
その変化は明らかよ。

一つ一つの動きの精度が段違い。
それは、長い研鑽でしか得られない
時間と努力の為せる技だから。

今の貴方に相応しい次の特訓
しっかり考えないといけないわね。
それじ

Splendid. Most impressive indeed. You've
cleared this round of boot camp without issue.

From where you're standing, you may not feel
like you're making much progress, but to an
outside observer, your improvement is palpable.

Each of your motions has grown drastically
more precise. Such technique can only be
honed through time and tireless effort.

I'll have to come up with a more fitting
boot camp session for you next time.
See you around.
